name: Easy Marshmallow Four Layer Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. Mix the cake mix, melted margarine, and water until well blended.
3. Spread the mixture into a greased 9x13-inch pan.
4. Bake for 20-22 minutes.
5. Layer marshmallows, chocolate chips, coconut, and pecans over the crust.
6. Bake for an additional 2-3 minutes, or until the marshmallows begin to melt.
7. Allow to cool completely before cutting into bars.
VARIATION: You can substitute 1 cup of M&Ms and 1/2 cup of chopped peanuts for chocolate chips, coconut, and pecans.
